positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon and a solitary stylized wolf howling at the moon, rendered in deep midnight blues, indigo, and celestial silver. The composition should feature clean, crisp silhouettes against a slightly lighter gradient background, suitable for a central placement on apparel. Emphasize strong graphic contrast, perfect symmetry in the central axis, and a clean, tattoo-style aesthetic. The artwork must have perfect edges and be designed to look excellent as a wearable print. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed vector illustration, high contrast, graphic novel style.
negative: blur, amateur, text, watermark, logo, signature, gradient background, noise, smudge, poor composition, messy lines, extra limbs, cropped, jpeg artifacts, low contrast
